learnings.text: DuckDB shares table contains escaped quotes and newlines that need normalization. Pattern: \"\n\" should become actual newlines. Content library has highest quality with originality scores. Voice-library-v2 is mostly comments, filtered for 300+ char content to find post-like entries.
LinkedIn posts from content_library overlap with D1.1 LinkedIn extraction - D5.1 merger should deduplicate on original_file paths and source markers
Voice-primitives.md is currently template-only with no extractable primitives. Future voice library builds should check for atomic primitives in Knowledge/voice-library/primitives/ directory.

voice-library-v2/linkedin_corpus.jsonl comments (261) are a complete subset of the DuckDB comments table (688). All 261 deduplicated. DuckDB is the superset source for LinkedIn comments. [Source: D1.2]

Gmail withTextPayload=true returns full text in 'payload' field. OOO auto-replies contaminated Jul-Sep 2025. Two-pass anonymization essential: pass 1 from metadata, pass 2 for body-only names. 73% of substantive emails are replies. Source: D3.2
/zo/ask output_format rejects 'integer' type — use 'number' instead. API accepts: string, number, boolean. D1.3 brief specifies 'integer' but that will 422 at the API layer. Source: D2.2
